Book Assessment
Our Services

Our Care Services

Tailored Support for Independent Living

More than just assistance. We provide a partnership.

At TVO CARE Limited, our services are built on evidence-based care models and a deep commitment to the empowerment of our service users. Based in Kings Cross, we serve a diverse range of needs across London with a personal, family-run touch.

Core Care Services

Programs Tailored To Your Routine

Explore our range of personalized support services designed to promote dignity and safety.

01

Domiciliary Care

Our primary goal is to help you stay in the home you love. We provide professional personal care tailored to your specific routine.

Assistance with:
  • Personal hygiene
  • Dressing
  • Medication management
  • Mobility support
Best For:

Individuals who need daily help to remain living safely and independently.

Explore DetailsBook Now
02

Supported Living

We empower adults with mental health needs or disabilities to manage their own homes. This service bridges the gap between total independence and 24-hour care.

Assistance with:
  • Tenancy support
  • Budgeting
  • Building life skills
  • Emotional wellbeing
Best For:

Adults (18-65) looking to gain confidence and autonomy in a community setting.

Explore DetailsBook Now
03

Home Help & Housekeeping

A well-kept home is essential for mental clarity and physical health. We take care of the "heavy lifting" so you can focus on your wellbeing.

Assistance with:
  • Light cleaning
  • Laundry
  • Grocery shopping
  • Meal preparation
Best For:

Those who find physical chores overwhelming or need support maintaining a healthy living environment.

Explore DetailsBook Now
04

Companionship & GP Appointments

Healthcare and social interaction should never be stressful. Our carers provide a friendly face and reliable transport for your essential outings.

Assistance with:
  • Appointment escort
  • Consultation note-taking
  • Social outings
  • Travel accompaniment
Best For:

Individuals who feel anxious about medical visits or those seeking meaningful social connection.

Explore DetailsBook Now

Providing premium, dignified home care services and companion assistance. Our mission is to enrich lives by ensuring independence, safety, and comfort at home.
